title: Explore a Week of Wonders in Iceland

scenes.text: An entire country that feels like a giant greenhouse of nature.
This is Iceland, located in the North Atlantic Ocean.
Iceland is home to geysers, waterfalls, and hot springs, thanks to its volcanic activity.
Witness the Midnight Sun during summer months.
scenes.label: MIDNIGHT SUN

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Iceland, North Atlantic Ocean - Iceland. A country where nature showcases geothermal wonders and awe-inspiring landscapes. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
